title: Fix config.js atomic write — ENOENT on rename after mkdir
description: Test config-persistence.test.js fails: setConfig writes valid JSON to disk. Error: ENOENT on rename from config.json.tmp to config.json. The issue is in src/config.js:332 — after mkdir in the catch block, the .tmp file from the original writeFile (line 331) no longer exists because the first writeFile wrote to a path whose parent dir didn't exist yet. Fix: ensure mkdir runs BEFORE writeFile, or re-write the .tmp file after mkdir. Error log from .team/verify-errors/latest-test.log.
